title: 68th Annual Grammy Awards - Best New Artist Category
text: The 68th Annual Grammy Awards took place on February 1, 2026. Olivia Dean won the Best New Artist award. The nominees were The Marías, Addison Rae, Katseye, Leon Thomas, Alex Warren, Lola Young, and Sombr. According to the article, Olivia Dean's victory marked the ninth woman in a row to claim this honor and made her the first British winner in this category since Dua Lipa won in 2019.
